docs.title: PR #42: Fix session token TTL
docs.content:
PR #42 in prbe-backend: Fix session token TTL
Description: Fixes AUTH-456 - the session token TTL was set to 30 seconds instead of 3600. Updated auth/config.py to use the correct value. Also added unit tests in tests/test_auth_config.py.

docs.title: AUTH-456: Login timeout after 30 seconds
docs.content:
Issue AUTH-456: Login timeout after 30 seconds
Status: Done
Fixed by PR #42 in prbe-backend.

expected_edges.note: PR explicitly says it fixes AUTH-456
